LanguageData.PM_WitnessedLiquefaction.label: saw a corpse liquefied
LanguageData.PM_LiquidReplenished.label: vital fuel recharged
LanguageData.PM_LiquidLow.label: low vital fuel
LanguageData.PM_NewSweeperBorn.label: new Sweeper incubated
LanguageData.PM_DaylightDiscomfort.label: daylight
LanguageData.PM_CleanedFilth_Mood.stages.0.label: filth purged
LanguageData.PM_CleanedFilth_Mood.stages.0.descriptio: I purged a little filth from the world. As it should be.
LanguageData.PM_Deconstructed_Mood.stages.0.label: refuse swept
LanguageData.PM_Deconstructed_Mood.stages.0.descripti: I dismantled what needed to be. The Backstreets are a little cleaner.
LanguageData.PM_FilthAround_Mood.stages.0.label: a hint of filth
LanguageData.PM_FilthAround_Mood.stages.0.description: There's a bit of filth here. It bothers me.
LanguageData.PM_FilthAround_Mood.stages.1.label: some filth
LanguageData.PM_FilthAround_Mood.stages.1.description: This place isn't clean. It's unpleasant.
LanguageData.PM_FilthAround_Mood.stages.2.label: repugnant filth
LanguageData.PM_FilthAround_Mood.stages.2.description: This place is dirty. It's an offense to my eyes.
LanguageData.PM_FilthAround_Mood.stages.3.label: pervasive grime
LanguageData.PM_FilthAround_Mood.stages.3.description: This place is drowning in grime. I can barely stand it.
LanguageData.PM_FilthAround_Mood.stages.4.label: intolerable squalor
LanguageData.PM_FilthAround_Mood.stages.4.description: This place is a pigsty of filth. It's unbearable.
LanguageData.PM_OutdoorsDaytime_Mood.stages.0.label: exposed to daylight
LanguageData.PM_OutdoorsDaytime_Mood.stages.0.descrip: I'm outside in broad daylight. Our place is in the shadows, toiling by Night.
LanguageData.PM_LowFuelMood.stages.0.label: low vital fuel
LanguageData.PM_LowFuelMood.stages.0.description: My vital fuel is running out. I feel drained, unstable, as if my very being is slowly dissolving.
LanguageData.PM_CriticalFuelMood.stages.0.label: critical vital fuel
LanguageData.PM_CriticalFuelMood.stages.0.description: I'm dissolving. Every moment without vital fuel is a cold agony — my liquid body freezes and my mind crumbles.
LanguageData.PM_WitnessedLiquefaction.stages.0.label: saw a corpse liquefied
LanguageData.PM_WitnessedLiquefaction.stages.0.descri: I watched the Sweepers dissolve a body in their machine. It's... hard to watch.
LanguageData.PM_LiquidReplenished.stages.0.label: vital fuel recharged
LanguageData.PM_LiquidReplenished.stages.0.descriptio: My tank is full. I'm operating at full capacity.
LanguageData.PM_LiquidLow.stages.0.label: critical vital fuel
LanguageData.PM_LiquidLow.stages.0.description: My tank is nearly dry. I must find organic matter quickly.
LanguageData.PM_LiquidLow.stages.1.label: low vital fuel
LanguageData.PM_LiquidLow.stages.1.description: My vital fuel level is dropping. I need to resupply soon.
LanguageData.PM_NewSweeperBorn.stages.0.label: a new Sweeper among us
LanguageData.PM_NewSweeperBorn.stages.0.description: The Mother produced a new Sweeper. Our group is growing.
LanguageData.PM_DaylightDiscomfort.stages.0.label: overloaded sensors
LanguageData.PM_DaylightDiscomfort.stages.0.descripti: The sunlight overloads my sensors. I'm operating at reduced capacity.
